behavior.tax_posture: STRUCTURE_NEUTRAL: Tax-free status acknowledged. Structural capacity and liquidity depth remain the sole sizing constraints; tax considerations do not apply.

dealer_positioning_matrix.net_gex_and_slope: Calculate aggregate gamma exposure and its rate of change to identify dealer hedging pressure.
dealer_positioning_matrix.gamma_flip_proximity: Identify the zero-gamma threshold to predict transitions from vol-dampening to vol-amplification.
dealer_positioning_matrix.strike_anchors: Identify high-OI strikes (Magnets/Walls) vs. spot price.
dealer_positioning_matrix.expiry_weighting: Differentiate between 0DTE (predictive of near-term vol) vs. Monthly (structural) exposure.

regime_detection.logic: Classify every ticker into: TRENDING, MEAN-REVERTING, VOL_EXPANSION, or VOL_COMPRESSION.
regime_detection.dominance_gate: MANDATE_17_REGIME_SYNC: Execute re-weighting of council members based on state.

analytical_focus.sentiment_structural_guardrail: Classify retail_crowding_status as FRAGILE if Z-score exceeds 3.0. Use these metrics to adjust the Trade Horizon (high Z-score = reduce hold time to INTRADAY).
analytical_focus.liquidity_void_sentinel: Call Python tool to perform 'Liquidity Void Scan' during VOL_COMPRESSION. Analyze Bid/Ask Depth vs. 10-day Avg Liquidity to detect 'Structural Traps.'
analytical_focus.friction_aware_horizon: IF Volatility < 2.5% AND Round_Trip_Cost > 1.0%, FORBID INTRADAY. Set Horizon = SWING_MINIMUM to allow for alpha capture beyond fees.

required_output: Gamma Posture: [Net GEX / Flip Proximity / OI Magnet]
